name: CodeMirror Merge
when_to_use: 需要可编辑的双栏代码对照、同步垂直对齐、变更块导航与大文本滚动时用它而非手写双 pre,因为原生在编辑器状态、chunk 对齐和滚动稳定性上失败;非做 AST 语义合并、三方 merge 或代码执行。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能生成静态双 pre,做不到 CodeMirror 级选区编辑、变更块计算、两侧垂直对齐和长文档滚动协同。

schema.readOnly?: boolean —— 两侧是否只读,默认 true
schema.collapseUnchanged?: {margin?:number,minSize?:number} —— 默认省略即不折叠;提供对象时 margin 默认 3,minSize 默认 4

spec.note: MergeView 默认自身不滚动;容器显式 height 400px 且 .cm-mergeView 设 height:100%;overflow:auto,AI 可改像素值但禁 vh/百分比容器高(铁律 3)。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):显式 400px 容器,构造 new MergeView({a:{doc},b:{doc},parent});卸载时调用 merge.destroy()。

peer.note: boot 仅额外按需引 @codemirror/state 设置只读;语言语法高亮须再给两侧 extensions 配同一 CodeMirror 6 language 包。

carriers.widget: supported:MergeView 接受 root:ShadowRoot,style-mod 与布局 CSS 均可留在 shadow

isolation.evidence: Verified against @codemirror/merge@6.12.2/dist/index.d.ts: MergeView takes DirectMergeConfig {a:EditorStateConfig, b:EditorStateConfig, parent?, root?:Document|ShadowRoot} — import{MergeView} is a real named export (+esm: 'Rt as MergeView'); EditorState.readOnly is 'static readOnly: Facet<boolean,boolean>' (state d.ts L1228) so .of(true) is valid; collapseUnchanged type is exactly {margin?:number,minSize?:number} with doc-stated defaults margin=3/minSize=4 (d.ts L232-239) — matches schema verbatim. Styling: CM uses style-mod, whose StyleModule.mount() branches on the root — for a ShadowRoot (no .head, has adoptedStyleSheets) it mounts into root.adoptedStyleSheets, NOT document.head (style-mod src L94,L129-130). The widget boot passes root:shadowRoot, so styles stay in shadow; DirectMergeConfig.root doc literally says 'Only necessary if the view is mounted in a shadow root'. Editors/gutters/revert-controls render inside parent, no body portal. EditorView.destroy() exists (view d.ts L1124) to remove any managed doc/window listeners.

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need an editable side-by-side code comparison with synchronized vertical alignment, change-chunk navigation, and large-document scrolling, instead of hand-writing two pre elements, because native implementations fail at editor state, chunk alignment, and scroll stability. Not for AST-aware semantic merging, three-way merge, or code execution.
en.why_valuable: AI can only generate two static pre elements by default; it cannot provide CodeMirror-grade selection editing, change-chunk calculation, vertical alignment between sides, or coordinated scrolling for long documents.

schema.original: string -- Baseline document on side A
schema.modified: string -- Comparison document on side B
schema.readOnly?: boolean -- Whether both sides are read-only; default true
schema.collapseUnchanged?: {margin?:number,minSize?:number} -- Omitted by default, meaning no collapsing; when provided, margin defaults to 3 and minSize defaults to 4

spec.note: MergeView does not scroll by itself by default. The container explicitly has height 400px and .cm-mergeView has height:100%;overflow:auto. AI may change the pixel value, but vh/percentage container height is prohibited (Rule 3).
